# Prefacio

Éste es un libro creado con mardown y con código ejecutable

Ésta es una referencia @wickham_r_2023

Remember do add how this book was written: how to write mathematics in relation to the chapter by Paul Halmos and  Head First Networking: A Brain-Friendly Guide  by Al Anderson, Ryan Benedetti

Also add the part about Los colombianos somos así by Eduardo Lora to use data from Colombia taking into account the heterogeneity of the university audience.
